title: Cheesy Pearl Tagine
description: A fusion of cheesy and malaysian flavors, paired with the sweetness of pear, all wrapped in a traditional tagine dish. Enjoy this unique and aromatic meal on a chilly evening.
instructions: Crumble the cheesy bread into a bowl.
Add the tagine spice mix and mix well.
In a separate pan, heat the olive oil and add the airy flatbread.
Toast the flatbread until crispy, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Place the toasted flatbread on a baking sheet.
Top the flatbread with the cheesy bread mixture and pear wedges.
Sprinkle with Korean chili flakes if desired.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown.
